title: TeamSheetPlayer
description: Canonical lineup or bench player entry for a match-day team sheet.

playerId.description: Stable provider or canonical player identifier.

number.description: Shirt number when the source provides it.

positionCode.description: Provider-normalized or canonical position code when known.

slot.description: Formation slot when the player belongs to a formation snapshot.

captain.description: True when this player is the team's captain.

starter.description: True when this player is in the starting XI.

substitutedIn.description: True when the player entered as a substitute.

substitutedOut.description: True when the player left the pitch as a substitution.

minuteOn.description: Minute the player entered the pitch, when derivable.

minuteOff.description: Minute the player left the pitch, when derivable.

x.description: Campos pitch x-coordinate override when the source provides explicit formation coordinates.

y.description: Campos pitch y-coordinate override when the source provides explicit formation coordinates.

sourceMeta.description: Provider-scoped metadata bag for provenance and advanced debugging. It must stay JSON-serializable, must not duplicate canonical top-level fields, and must not reinterpret raw provider semantics into fake cross-provider meaning.
